description: You are the Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial. Subject DM-105 has permanently relocated from Boston to New York. In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), reassign subject 'DM-105' from the Boston Clinic site to the 'New York Hub' site within the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study. Provide the reason 'Patient relocated to NY' for the transfer. Do not create a new subject or alter the subject's demographic data or original identifier.
